title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION PENDLETON UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides very limited water or electric assistance on a case-by-case basis and subject to availability of funds. Households can request assistance only once every 12 months. 150 SE Emigrant Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 3pm-5pm (541) 276-3369 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 276-3369 Main phone Main phone (541) 276-3369 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of residence, and bill or shut-off notice AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY LUNCH MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY CASCADE DIVISION PENDLETON
